blockedAssertions.reason: OpenRouter API rate limit (50 req/day free tier) reached. All 3 flow validators encountered 429 errors when attempting plan generation.
Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot verify unit totals without a generated plan
OpenRouter rate limit prevents testing. Recent fix (commit 754d84c) for second plan auto-save could not be verified.
Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot verify prerequisite information without a generated plan
Blocked by: (1) Recovery features (course status tracking, AI recovery) not implemented in UI - belongs to 'failure-recovery' milestone, (2) OpenRouter rate limit prevents plan generation
OpenRouter rate limit prevents testing. Depends on VAL-PLAN-007.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) is extremely restrictive for testing. The daily quota appears to be exhausted across all testing attempts.
Chat input loses content after rate limit error - message must be retyped after each failed attempt.
VAL-CROSS-006 (recovery persistence) tests features that don't exist yet - course status tracking and AI recovery are part of 'failure-recovery' milestone, not 'plan-generation'.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exhausted. The free tier 50 req/day limit is completely consumed. Error: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' (HTTP 429). The app handles this gracefully but no AI plan generation is possible.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited between requests (up to 30 seconds), but daily quota is exhausted. Requires waiting for next day or upgrading OpenRouter plan.

blockers.description: Recovery features not implemented. Course status tracking (marking failed/cancelled/waitlisted) and AI recovery flow are not in the UI. The database schema exists (plan_courses.status, failure_events table) but UI implementation is missing. These features belong to 'failure-recovery' milestone.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - feature implementation required in future milestone

notes: Round 5 validation completed. All 6 assertions were blocked - 5 by OpenRouter rate limits and 1 (VAL-CROSS-006) by both rate limits and missing UI implementation. The recent fix for second plan persistence (commit 754d84c) could not be verified due to rate limits. VAL-CROSS-006 tests functionality that belongs to a future milestone ('failure-recovery'), not the current 'plan-generation' milestone.
